articles.title: Photos: Here are the best scenes from the Norway-France World Cup matchup at ‘Boston Stadium’
articles.description:
Kylian Mbappe, Ousmane Dembélé, and the Norwegian fans highlighted the iconic imagery.

The post Photos: Here are the best scenes from the Norway-France World Cup matchup at ‘Boston Stadium’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Norway faced France in a World Cup match at Boston Stadium on June 28.
Kylian Mbappe and Ousmane Dembélé showcased their skills, thrilling local fans.
The event boosted local tourism and engagement in Boston's sports culture.

articles.title: 5 prospects to watch during Bruins Development Camp
articles.description:
Dean Letourneau and Cooper Simpson are among the headlines in Boston's upcoming Development Camp.

The post 5 prospects to watch during Bruins Development Camp appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins Development Camp features top prospects Dean Letourneau and Cooper Simpson.
Camp runs from June 28 to July 1, showcasing five key players.
Local fans can evaluate future talent for the Bruins' roster.
